basic_details.job_title: IIPA Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Public Administration (IIPA), New Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Professor (Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Chair in Social Justice)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Public Administration (IIPA), New Delhi has announced recruitment for Assistant Professor (Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Chair in Social Justice) on contract basis. This is a single post sponsored by Dr. Ambedkar Foundation, Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India. Eligible candidates with Master’s degree in Political Science/Economics/Law and NET/SET/PhD qualification can apply. The last date to submit the application is within one month from the date of publication in newspapers. Find complete details on eligibility, application process, and official notif

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | (i) Academic Qualification Master’s degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Political Science / Economics / Law from a recognized Indian or foreign university. 5% relaxation for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PwD/EWS categories. | (ii) Eligibility Criteria Candidates must have: | Qualified NET (UGC/CSIR), or Qualified SET/SLET, or Ph.D. degree in accordance with UGC Regulations (exempted from NET) | (iii) Experience No mandatory teaching/research experience required. Relevant experience is desirable. | (iv) Preference Given to SC/ST, Backward Classes, or socially and economically weaker sections.

salary_details.pay_scale: Academic Level-10 (Entry Pay Rs. 57,700 – Rs. 1,82,400) + DA, HRA, Annual Increment as per UGC 7th CPC

selection_process: and publications followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called. Mere eligibility does not guarantee selection.
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed Application Form from www.iipa.org.in or use the format given in the advertisement.

Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of all required documents (certificates, marksheets, NET/PhD certificates, publications, experience, date of birth proof, category certificate, etc.).
Tag all documents securely in chronological order.
Send the complete application to: The Superintendent (Administration), Room No. 60, 2nd Floor, Indian Institute of Public Administration, I.P. Estate, Ring Road, New Delhi – 110002
Persons in service should send advance copy and produce NOC at interview.
Filled application form with signature and photograph
important_instructions: This is a purely contractual/temporary position. No claim for regularization or permanent absorption. Incomplete applications or those received after the last date will be rejected. No TA/DA for attending interview. IIPA reserves the right to cancel/withdraw the recruitment at any stage. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Biometric attendance mandatory if selected.

all_official_links.label: Download IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Public Administration (IIPA), an apex National Institute engaged in research and training in Public Administration and Governance, invites applications purely on contract basis for the position of Assistant Professor (Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Chair in Social Justice). Download IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIPA Assistant Professor (Dr. Ambedkar Chair) Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_public_administratio: Assistant Professor (Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Chair in Social Justice)
Dr. Ambedkar’s thoughts & philosophy / Social Justice / Human Rights including emancipation of Dalits, Backward Castes/Classes, Women, Minorities, Marginalized Communities, Social Inclusion
Academic Level-10 (Entry Pay Rs. 57,700 – Rs. 1,82,400) + DA, HRA, Annual Increment as per UGC 7th CPC
Contract / Deputation basis (Initially 3 years, extendable by 2 years subject to performance)

content_sections.heading: IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: (i) Academic Qualification Master’s degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Political Science / Economics / Law from a recognized Indian or foreign university. 5% relaxation for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PwD/EWS categories. (ii) Eligibility Criteria Candidates must have: Qualified NET (UGC/CSIR), or Qualified SET/SLET, or Ph.D. degree in accordance with UGC Regulations (exempted from NET) (iii) Experience No mandatory teaching/research experience required. Relevant experience is desirable. (iv) Preference Given to SC/ST, Backward Classes, or socially and economically weaker sections.

content_sections.heading: IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on qualifications, experience, and publications followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called. Mere eligibility does not guarantee selection.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Documents Required: Filled application form with signature and photograph Educational certificates & marksheets NET/SET/PhD certificates Experience certificates Publications list with proof (ISBN/ISSN etc.) Category certificate (if applicable) Date of birth proof

content_sections.heading: IIPA Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a purely contractual/temporary position. No claim for regularization or permanent absorption. Incomplete applications or those received after the last date will be rejected. No TA/DA for attending interview. IIPA reserves the right to cancel/withdraw the recruitment at any stage. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Biometric attendance mandatory if selected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIPA Assistant Professor Dr. Ambedkar Chair 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must reach within one month from the date of advertisement publication in newspapers.

faq.question: Q2. What is the pay scale for Assistant Professor at IIPA Dr. Ambedkar Chair?
faq.answer: Academic Level-10 with entry pay Rs. 57,700 to Rs. 1,82,400 plus allowances as per UGC 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for IIPA Assistant Professor Social Justice post?
faq.answer: Master’s degree with 55% in Political Science/Economics/Law + NET/SET or PhD as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is PhD mandatory for IIPA Assistant Professor (Dr. Ambedkar Chair) Recruitment?
faq.answer: No. NET/SET qualified candidates are also eligible. PhD as per UGC regulations exempts NET.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIPA New Delhi Assistant Professor vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the date of advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. How many posts are there in IIPA Dr. Ambedkar Chair recruitment?
faq.answer: Only 01 (one) post on contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where to send the application form for IIPA Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: To Superintendent (Administration), Room No. 60, 2nd Floor, IIPA, I.P. Estate, Ring Road, New Delhi-110002.

faq.question: Q8. Is this IIPA Assistant Professor post permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: It is purely on contract basis (initially 3 years, extendable by 2 years). No regularization.

faq.question: Q9. Is teaching experience required for IIPA Assistant Professor Dr. Ambedkar Chair?
faq.answer: No mandatory experience required as per UGC norms; relevant experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIPA provide age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, as per Government of India guidelines for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/EWS.
